arts.ttl: David Moyes makes Carlos Alcaraz contract admission ahead of summer rebuild
arts.sum: The Blues boss said he is bearing Carlos Alcaraz's performance clause in mind as he considers how to approach upcoming games

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta reveals solution to injury crisis after 'tough' admission
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has named how he believes pressure on players can be eased amid fresh injury crisis for Arsenal ahead of Premier League trip to Everton on Saturday lunchtime

arts.ttl: Arsenal out to avoid William Saliba repeat after being dealt fresh injury hammer blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has been dealt yet another injury blow as Arsenal gear up for the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final against Real Madrid next Tuesday

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Arsenal's transfer plans could change due to key reason
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta reveals how injuries could affect the club's plans for Andrea Berta's first transfer window as sporting director.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man United 'dealt Viktor Gyokeres transfer blow' as new club joins race for Sporting star
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United reportedly suffer a blow in their respective pursuits of Sporting Lisbon star Viktor Gyokeres.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups

arts.ttl: Papers: Arsenal eye summer move for Gyokeres
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Friday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Hope for Dominic Calvert-Lewin as Everton striker continues injury recovery
arts.sum: The Everton striker is scheduled to be available for the first team in around a month, meaning he could yet feature for the club before the end of the season

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta calls for wider Premier League squad limits after Gabriel Magalhaes was ruled out for the rest of the season with hamstring injury
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has pleaded for wider Premier League squad limits to be introduced to protect players following Gabriel Magalhaes's season-ending hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains how to fix Arsenal injury nightmare - 'It's the only solution'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta wants Premier League clubs to be allowed to select bigger squads to combat increased demands after fresh injury blow leaves Arsenal without up to four defenders against Everton
